title: Crew travelling to New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Crew travelling to New Zealand
Learn about visa requirements for crew of passenger airlines, cruise ships, cargo ships, fishing vessels, and private yachts and planes.
- Crew of planes, cruise ships and cargo ships Crew of passenger airlines, cruise ships and cargo ships must have a Crew ETA (Electronic Travel Authority) before they leave for New Zealand.

## Crew of planes, cruise ships and cargo ships
Crew of passenger airlines, cruise ships and cargo ships must have a Crew ETA (Electronic Travel Authority) before they leave for New Zealand.
- Crew of fishing vessels, private yachts and planes Crew of fishing vessels and private craft must have an NZeTA or visa before they can come to New Zealand.

## Crew of fishing vessels, private yachts and planes
Crew of fishing vessels and private craft must have an NZeTA or visa before they can come to New Zealand.
